zh.lifeSummary: 當Benedicta de Babington於1360年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾易亞斯特 布利其福德時，她的父親John de Babington IV27歲，母親Benidicta de La Warde23歲。她於1376年11月與Sir Hugh Annesley在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1448年5月6日在她的家鄉享年88歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benedicta de Babington于1360年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾易亞斯特 布利其福德时，她的父亲John de Babington IV27岁，母亲Benidicta de La Warde23岁。她于1376年11月与Sir Hugh Annesley在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾安斯利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1448年5月6日在她的家乡享年88岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Babington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name for someone from Babington in Somerset or Great or Little Bavington in Northumberland, which is recorded as Babington until the early 18th century. Both are named with the Old English personal name Babba (see Babb ) + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The name may also be derived from Bebington in Cheshire (see 2 below) or Bevington in Warwickshire (see Bevington , which has sometimes been altered in spelling by association with Babington).

English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of Bebbington, a habitational name from Bebington in Cheshire, from the Old English personal name Bebba + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The alteration to Bavington and Bevington shows a common development of -b- to -v- in placenames and surnames.

variants.name: Babb
meanings: English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from the Middle English personal name Babb(e), usually no doubt a pet form of the female personal name Barbara (see Barbara ), but possibly in some cases a survival of the Old English personal name Babba, which is found in several placenames, including Babbacombe in Devon and Babington in Somerset.
English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from Middle English babe ‘infant, young child’, applied as a nickname.
Americanized form of German   Bobb   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Bevington
meanings: (southwest Midlands): habitational name from either of two places, in Warwickshire and Gloucestershire, named Bevington, from the Old English personal name Bēofa + Old English -ing- implying association + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Benedicta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Benedict  , in occasional use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Benedicte
meanings: Feminine form of   Benedict  , in occasional use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Benedicta de Babington was born in 1360, in East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, John de Babington IV, was 27 and her mother, Benidicta de La Warde, was 23. She married Sir Hugh Annesley in November 1376, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 6 May 1448, in her hometown, at the age of 88, and was buried in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benedicta de Babington est née en 1360, à East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Babington IV, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Benidicta de La Warde, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh Annesley en novembre 1376, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 mai 1448, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benedicta de Babington 1360 in East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Babington IV 27 und ihre Mutter Benidicta de La Warde 23. Sie hat im November 1376 in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Hugh Annesley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Mai 1448 im Alter von 88 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benedicta de Babington è nata il nel 1360 nel East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, John de Babington IV, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Benidicta de La Warde, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Hugh Annesley nel novembre 1376, nel Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 6 maggio 1448, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Benedicta de Babingtonが1360年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアエアスト ブリドグフォードで生まれた時，父John de Babington IVは27歳，母Benidicta de La Wardeは23歳であった。1376年11月にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーでSir Hugh Annesleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1448年5月6日に故郷で88歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Benedicta de Babington(이)가 1360년 영국 노틴그함실르 이스트 브리지퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Babington IV(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Benidicta de La Warde(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1376년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 Sir Hugh Annesley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1448년 5월 6일 그녀의 고향에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benedicta de Babington nasceu em 1360, em East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Babington IV, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Benidicta de La Warde, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh Annesley em novembro de 1376, em Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de maio de 1448, em sua cidade natal, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benedicta de Babington родилась в 1360 г. в местности эаст бриджфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Babington IV было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Benidicta de La Warde, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh Annesley ноябрь 1376 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 6 мая 1448 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benedicta de Babington nació en 1360, en East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Babington IV, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Benidicta de La Warde, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Hugh Annesley en noviembre de 1376, en Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 6 de mayo de 1448, en su pueblo, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
